expectations.text: Uses Value vs Effort matrix as requested, not RICE
expectations.evidence: Explicitly selects Value vs. Effort framework via the framework selection logic. Uses 2x2 quadrant matrix, not RICE scoring.

expectations.text: Items are placed in four quadrants (high-value/low-effort, high-value/high-effort, low-value/low-effort, low-value/high-effort)
expectations.evidence: ASCII 2x2 matrix with four quadrants labeled: Quick Wins, Strategic Bets, Fill-ins, Avoid. All 6 items placed in appropriate quadrants.

expectations.text: Assumptions behind value and effort estimates are visible
expectations.evidence: Dedicated 'Assumptions' table with Value Rationale and Effort Rationale columns for each of the 6 items, explaining why each was placed where it was.

expectations.text: The three mandatory challenges are still run after the framework
expectations.evidence: All three challenges present: Strategic Override Test (considers custom dashboard layouts, SSO), Data Gap Test (notification preferences, dark mode), What Would We Regret Test (identifies bulk user import, confirms alignment with matrix).
